title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 19 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 19 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 19 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/08/2024
Iron ore futures continued to trade in a strong and volatile manner today, with the main contract I2501 closing at 712, a 0.71% increase for the day.Traders followed the trend and shipped their goods accordingly. Steel mills remained cautious and only restocked necessary supplies. Overall, the market had a quiet atmosphere with low trading activity.
